projects.title: Tutora - Online Learning Platform
projects.description: A comprehensive online learning platform with course management, student progress tracking, and interactive learning features.

projects.title: BookStore - E-commerce Platform
projects.description: Modern e-book store with advanced search, user reviews, shopping cart, and secure payment integration.

projects.title: Dwello Estate - Luxury Real Estate Platform
projects.description: A premium real estate website showcasing luxury properties with advanced search filters, interactive maps, virtual tours, and a sophisticated design tailored for high-end property listings.

caseStudy.challenge: Create a visually stunning and user-friendly platform to showcase luxury properties with seamless browsing experience, property filtering, and modern design aesthetics that appeal to high-end clientele.
caseStudy.solution: Developed a responsive React-based real estate platform with advanced property filtering, smooth animations, interactive elements, and a sophisticated color palette that reflects luxury and professionalism.
results: Increased user engagement by 65% through intuitive UI/UX design
Reduced page load time by 40% with optimized assets
Mobile-responsive design reaching 70% of users on mobile devices
Seamless property browsing with 50+ property listings
features: Advanced property search with multiple filters
Interactive property cards with hover animations
Smooth page transitions with Framer Motion
Responsive design for all screen sizes
Property details pages with high-quality imagery

projects.title: Organizational Analysis & Strategy Development
projects.description: A structured organizational transformation initiative covering internal analysis, peer benchmarking, gap identification, SMART goal setting, scenario planning, and phased implementation — built on a BABOK-aligned methodology.

caseStudy.challenge: The organization lacked a structured approach to evaluate its current state, benchmark against peers, and translate insights into an actionable transformation strategy. Key issues included operational inefficiencies, capability gaps, and misalignment between structure and strategy.
caseStudy.solution: Applied a BABOK-aligned methodology combining qualitative and quantitative analysis across 8 internal dimensions, peer group benchmarking, root cause identification, and a phased implementation roadmap with SMART goals and scenario-based risk management.
results: Identified critical performance gaps through structured benchmarking
Defined SMART strategic goals aligned to organizational constraints
Developed multi-scenario risk framework with mitigation strategies
Designed a 3-phase implementation roadmap with KPI tracking system
features: Full internal audit across 8 organizational dimensions
Peer group identification and competitive benchmarking
Root cause analysis and gap identification
SMART goals framework for each strategic objective
Scenario analysis with risk probability and impact scoring
Phased implementation plan with governance structure
KPI dashboard design for performance monitoring
